_comment: Autonomous post+repost decision-maker (src/triggers/ai_manager.py), retargeted to a slower, fixed 4-6 posts/day cadence rather than a high-volume feed -- min_hours_between_calls plus max_posts_per_day bound it to roughly that range even though the workflow itself runs hourly. Replies now run separately/faster in config/reply_manager.json + src/triggers/reply_manager.py. When a post has no image available (OPENAI_API_KEY unset, or generation failed), the link fallback prefers the real source URL of whichever news article the post is actually based on (Claude's news_index) -- fallback_link_url (here: the public Telegram channel) is only used when the post isn't based on one specific article. Leave fallback_link_url blank to just post without a link/image in that case rather than blocking the post entirely.
